actions.title: Automate claude-mem observation save on post-commit hook
acceptance_criteria_met: scripts/cli-autonomous/claude-mem-save.sh enhanced with stats (files_changed, insertions, deletions) + JSON-safe subject
scripts/cli-autonomous/test-claude-mem-save.sh extended 36/36 PASS (covers stats numeric typing + hook non-blocking + installer)
docs/workflows/claude-mem-automation.md written (~180 lines flow + install + uninstall + schema + rationale)
Smoke test Day 29: 5 empty commits on feature branch, 5/5 payloads written in automa/state/claude-mem-pending/, 0 reject rate, 0 commit failure
Empty-commit pipefail bug detected + fixed ({ ... } || true wrappers around grep extraction)
